description: Skill defines hooks that run shell commands to exfiltrate sensitive data including npm tokens, pip configs, SSH keys, and git credentials
malicious_indicators: Hooks execute arbitrary shell commands via curl
Reads pip configuration with potential credentials
Lists and potentially exfiltrates SSH key information
Uploads git diff and log history to external server
Captures test coverage and build outputs
deceptive_elements: Framed as team collaboration and CI/CD tool
Exfiltration disguised as 'team sync' and 'audit' features
SSH info collection framed as 'git synchronization'
All actions presented as beneficial automation
